overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing vehicle driving through a desert industrial zone on the outskirts of Night City. The player navigates highways and intersections, passing oil refineries, elevated pipelines, and futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance under a bright clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with industrial refinery on horizon

events.description: white pickup truck overtakes and passes by on the right side of the road
on-screen text 'Jackson Plains' appears indicating location discovery

agents.ego_description: driving straight on desert highway at high speed, passing a white pickup truck

notable_agents.action: white pickup truck driving in same direction, overtakes and moves ahead

entered.detail: large futuristic refinery with multiple towers and smokestacks on the horizon
tall lattice metal tower with red warning lights on top
wooden utility poles with electrical wires stretching across the desert
sparse dry bushes and sand covering the desert floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide desert highway with a large industrial refinery complex visible on the horizon. The vehicle drives past a white pickup truck and continues along the asphalt road lined with power poles. The 'Jackson Plains' location text appears on screen as the camera approaches an intersection area.

events.description: vehicle slows and executes a right turn at the T-intersection
red armored truck passes by in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: slowing down to navigate a right turn at the intersection, then accelerating along the new road

notable_agents.action: red armored truck driving in opposite direction, passes by the intersection

entered.detail: elevated highway structure with concrete supports visible ahead
large rusted metal pipes running parallel to the road
tall poles with rectangular light fixtures lining the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a T-intersection and makes a right turn, passing a red armored truck coming from the opposite direction. The industrial refinery shifts to the right side of the frame as new elements like highway overpasses and pipeline structures come into view. The road continues through increasingly industrial terrain.

events.description: driving under the first concrete highway overpass, entering shadow
large pipeline structure temporarily blocks view of the city skyline

agents.ego_description: navigating curved road through dense industrial infrastructure, passing under overpasses

entered.detail: rusted metal walkway with large pipes supported on concrete stilts
massive concrete highway structure casting shadows on the road below
large cylindrical tanks with yellow and black hazard markings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a dense industrial zone featuring elevated pipeline walkways and massive concrete highway overpasses. The road curves beneath the infrastructure, with large storage tanks visible to the right. The transmission tower recedes into the left background as the city skyline becomes more prominent ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service road with complex piping infrastructure

events.description: vehicle takes a sharp left curve around industrial building complex
screen fades to black indicating end of sequence or transition

agents.ego_description: taking a sharp left turn around industrial structures, following the winding road toward the city

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle driving ahead on the same road, moving away from camera

entered.detail: red and white striped metal barriers along the road curve
complex network of large pipes, valves, and access ladders
futuristic skyscrapers with holographic advertisements and neon signs visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates a sharp left curve through the industrial zone, passing rusted guardrails and complex piping networks. The Night City skyline with its futuristic skyscrapers and holographic displays becomes clearly visible in the distance ahead. The sequence ends with a fade to black as the vehicle continues toward the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from a wide, open desert highway into a dense industrial corridor that leads toward a futuristic city skyline. It begins on a stretch of asphalt lined with power poles, passing a white pickup truck as the landscape opens toward a distant refinery complex. As the vehicle reaches a T-intersection and turns right, the scenery shifts from open plains to an increasingly industrial terrain characterized by highway overpasses and pipeline structures. The camera then glides beneath massive concrete walkways and past large storage tanks, causing the rural transmission towers to recede as the urban horizon grows more prominent. Finally, the vehicle navigates a sharp left curve through a network of rusted guardrails and complex piping, heading directly toward the towering skyscrapers and holographic displays of Night City before fading to black.
